package repository

import (
	"context"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type PatientModel struct {
	ID int
}

type PatientRepository struct {
	db *gorm.DB
}

func (r *PatientRepository) FindByID(ctx context.Context, id int) error {
	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", id).First(&PatientModel{}).Error
}
